- Feature branch: feat/<random-id>-<feature-name>
- Plan branch: feat/plans/<random-id>-<feature-name>
To generate <random-id> WITHOUT shell metacharacters:
- Use the last 6 digits of current unix timestamp
- Get timestamp with ONE shell_exec call:

- Take last 6 characters of the output as random-id
- Example: timestamp=1773456789 → random-id=456789

2. git pull origin main

4. git checkout -b feat/plans/<random-id>-<feature-name>
